title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese discusses four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team used with Claude Code to achieve rapid growth from $1B to $19B in 14 months: automating existing workflows, enabling previously sub-threshold work, building custom tools, and using AI as a thought partner. He identifies a common ceiling where AI becomes additional work rather than leverage.
